reviews.review_title: If I could give this a 0 star I would
reviews.review_description:
Game sucks, it's all made from only youtube tutorials, graphics are horrible, player model sucks, stolen assets with no credit to the real AND SKILLED DEVELOPER, texture are horribly done, the gameplay is horrible there is nothing to do! Take this game down it will never be good! To go into gorilla tag lobbies with your friend and say " I made a gorilla tag fan game! Trust me ifs really hold and fun!" Is actually embarrassing 🤣💀🙏

The fact that you have to get your admins to give 5 star reviews is just sad, you guys are a bunch of 6 year olds🤣🤣😭😭

guys. help. i was loving this game.  the admin were telling me "you have to do what we tell you" and i replied "i know"! 
i was accused of saying "no" and permanently banned.  can someone please get me back in???

reviews.review_title: Worst game ever - ban people for nothing
reviews.review_description: Imagine someone purchasing your game, adding value to it and being banned for nothing. The bully mentality of these people is absolutely wild.

developer_response.body: Oh. We are sorry about that. I don't know what you mean by 'value' though because theres nothing to do with adding stuff. If you don't like the game, its not our fault. Others like the game.
